styleIntentZh: 只调整最终生图的画工与渲染表现，不改变人物设定、叙事事件、道具关系、场景事实或构图语义。
stylePositiveEn: anime daily-life rendering with stable local color blocks
clear silhouette readability without poster-like exaggeration
guardrailsEn: do not change character identity, age impression, clothing design, props, actions, setting, story event, or camera framing
do not add new objects, remove required evidence, or rewrite the selected moment
